G3370.strongs_def: a Median, or inhabitant of Media

G3361.derivation: a primary particle of qualified negation (whereas G3756 (οὐ) expresses an absolute denial);
G3361.strongs_def: (adverb) not, (conjunction) lest; also (as an interrogative implying a negative answer (whereas G3756 (οὐ) expects an affirmative one)) whether
G3361.kjv_def: any but (that), X forbear, + God forbid, + lack, lest, neither, never, no (X wise in), none, nor, (can-)not, nothing, that not, un(-taken), without
G3361.usage: not(486x), no(44x), lest(14x), neither(7x), but(3x), none(3x)

G3346.strongs_def: to transfer, i.e. (literally) transport, (by implication) exchange, (reflexively) change sides, or (figuratively) pervert
G3346.kjv_def: carry over, change, remove, translate, turn

G3386.strongs_def: not at all then, i.e. not to say (the rather still)

G3304.derivation: from G3203 and G3767 (οὖν) and G1065 (γέ);

G3377.derivation: probably from the same base as G3145 (μασσάομαι) and G3415 (μνάομαι) (i.e. , to strive);
G3377.strongs_def: to disclose (through the idea of mental effort and thus calling to mind), i.e. report, declare, intimate

G3308.derivation: from G3307 (μερίζω) (through the idea of distraction);

G3364.strongs_def: a double negative strengthening the denial; not at all
G3364.kjv_def: any more, at all, by any (no) means, neither, never, no (at all), in no case (wise), nor ever, not (at all, in any wise)

G3322.strongs_def: to form the middle, i.e. (in point of time), to be half-way over

G3378.strongs_def: as interrogative and negative, is it not that?

G3344.strongs_def: to turn across, i.e. transmute or (figuratively) corrupt

G3313.derivation: from an obsolete but more primary form of (to get as a section or allotment);
G3313.strongs_def: a division or share (literally or figuratively, in a wide application)
G3313.kjv_def: behalf, course, coast, craft, particular (+ -ly), part (+ -ly), piece, portion, respect, side, some sort(-what)

G3373.strongs_def: to lengthen, i.e. (middle voice) to enlarge

G3343.strongs_def: to send from elsewhere, i.e. (middle voice) to summon or invite

G3356.derivation: from a compound of the base of G3357 (μετρίως) and G3806 (πάθος);
G3356.strongs_def: to be moderate in passion, i.e. gentle (to treat indulgently)

G3310.strongs_def: a portion, i.e. province, share or (abstractly) participation

G3345.derivation: from G3326 (μετά) and a derivative of G4976 (σχῆμα);
G3345.strongs_def: to transfigure or disguise; figuratively, to apply (by accommodation)

G3321.derivation: from a presumed compound of G3319 (μέσος) and G3772 (οὐρανός);

G3385.derivation: from G3361 (μή) and the neuter of G5100 (τὶς);
G3385.kjv_def: not (the particle usually not expressed, except by the form of the question)

G3392.strongs_def: to sully or taint, i.e. contaminate (ceremonially or morally)

G3327.derivation: from G3326 (μετά) and the base of G939 (βάσις);

G3349.derivation: from a compound of G3326 (μετά) and a collateral form of G142 (αἴρω) or perhaps rather G109 (ἀήρ) (compare "meteor");
G3349.strongs_def: to raise in mid-air, i.e. (figuratively) suspend (passively, fluctuate or be anxious)

G3315.strongs_def: to interpose (as arbiter), i.e (by implication) to ratify (as surety)

G3318.strongs_def: Mesopotamia (as lying between the Euphrates and the Tigris; compare 0763), a region of Asia

G3360.strongs_def: as far as, i.e. up to a certain point (as a preposition, of extent (denoting the terminus, whereas G891 (ἄχρι) refers especially to the space of time or place intervening) or conjunction)

G3331.strongs_def: transposition, i.e. transferral (to heaven), disestablishment (of a law)

G3341.strongs_def: (subjectively) compunction (for guilt, including reformation); by implication, reversal (of (another's) decision)

G3351.strongs_def: to transfer as a settler or captive, i.e colonize or exile

G3317.derivation: neuter of compound of G3319 (μέσος) and G3571 (νύξ);

G3319.kjv_def: among, X before them, between, + forth, mid(-day, -night), midst, way

G3367.kjv_def: any (man, thing), no (man), none, not (at all, any man, a whit), nothing, + without delay

G3366.strongs_def: but not, not even; in a continued negation, nor
G3366.kjv_def: neither, nor (yet), (no) not (once, so much as)

G3348.strongs_def: to share or participate; by implication, belong to, eat (or drink)
G3348.kjv_def: be partaker, pertain, take part, use

G3397.derivation: masculine or neuter singular of G3398 (μικρός) (as noun);
G3397.strongs_def: a small space of time or degree

G3384.strongs_def: a "mother" (literally or figuratively, immediate or remote)

G3375.strongs_def: a particle of affirmation (only with G2229 (ἦ)); assuredly

G3398.strongs_def: small (in size, quantity, number or (figuratively) dignity)

G3307.strongs_def: to part, i.e. (literally) to apportion, bestow, share, or (figuratively) to disunite, differ
G3307.kjv_def: deal, be difference between, distribute, divide, give participle

G3340.strongs_def: to think differently or afterwards, i.e. reconsider (morally, feel compunction)

G3389.derivation: from G3384 (μήτηρ) and the base of G257 (ἅλων);

G3338.derivation: from G3326 (μετά) and the middle voice of G3199 (μέλω);

G3391.kjv_def: a (certain), + agree, first, one, X other

G3371.kjv_def: any longer, (not) henceforth, hereafter, no henceforward (longer, more, soon), not any more

G3328.strongs_def: to throw over, i.e. (middle voice figuratively) to turn about in opinion

G3379.strongs_def: not ever; also if (or lest) ever (or perhaps)
G3379.kjv_def: if peradventure, lest (at any time, haply), not at all, whether or not

G3365.derivation: adverb from a compound of G3361 (μή) and (somebody);

G3383.strongs_def: not too, i.e. (in continued negation) neither or nor; also, not even

G3350.derivation: from a derivative of a compound of G3326 (μετά) and G3624 (οἶκος);
G3350.strongs_def: a change of abode, i.e. (specially), expatriation

G3334.strongs_def: to stir to a place elsewhere, i.e. remove (figuratively)

G3306.strongs_def: to stay (in a given place, state, relation or expectancy)
G3306.kjv_def: abide, continue, dwell, endure, be present, remain, stand, tarry (for), X thine own
G3306.usage: abide(61x), remain(16x), dwell(15x), continue(11x), tarry(9x), endure(3x)

G3335.strongs_def: to participate; genitive case, to accept (and use)
G3335.kjv_def: eat, have, be partaker, receive, take

G3362.kjv_def: X before, but, except, if, no, (if, + whosoever) not

G3357.derivation: adverb from a derivative of G3358 (μέτρον);

G3355.strongs_def: a measurer, i.e. (specially), a certain standard measure of capacity for liquids

G3354.strongs_def: to measure (i.e. ascertain in size by a fixed standard); by implication, to admeasure (i.e. allot by rule)

G3399.strongs_def: Miletus, a city of Asia Minor

G3358.strongs_def: a measure ("metre"), literally or figuratively; by implication, a limited portion (degree)

G3387.kjv_def: any (sometimes unexpressed except by the simple interrogative form of the sentence)

G3353.strongs_def: participant, i.e. (as noun) a sharer; by implication, an associate

G3381.kjv_def: lest (by any means, by some means, haply, perhaps)

G3325.strongs_def: to replenish, i.e. (by implication) to intoxicate

G3326.strongs_def: properly, denoting accompaniment; "amid" (local or causal); modified variously according to the case (genitive association, or accusative succession) with which it is joined; occupying an intermediate position between G575 (ἀπό) or G1537 (ἐκ) and G1519 (εἰς) or G4314 (πρός); less intimate than G1722 (ἐν) and less close than G4862 (σύν))
G3326.kjv_def: after(-ward), X that he again, against, among, X and, + follow, hence, hereafter, in, of, (up-)on, + our, X and setting, since, (un-)to, + together, when, with (+ -out)

G3316.strongs_def: a go-between, i.e. (simply) an internunciator, or (by implication) a reconciler (intercessor)

G3303.strongs_def: properly, indicative of affirmation or concession (in fact); usually followed by a contrasted clause with G1161 (δέ) (this one, the former, etc.)
G3303.kjv_def: even, indeed, so, some, truly, verily

G3342.derivation: from G3326 (μετά) and a form of G4862 (σύν);
G3342.strongs_def: betwixt (of place or person); (of time) as adjective, intervening, or (by implication) adjoining
